query:
SELECT
               r.id AS review_id,
               r.reviewer_id,
               r.target_type,
               r.target_id,
               r.rating,
               r.comment,
               COUNT(cf.id) AS flag_count
           FROM reviews r
           LEFT JOIN content_flags cf
               ON cf.target_type = 'review' AND cf.target_id = r.id AND cf.resolved = FALSE
           GROUP BY r.id
           HAVING COUNT(cf.id) > 0
           ORDER BY flag_count DESC, r.created_at DESC
